member.name: P:YLproxy.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandler.OnUserNotification
member.summary: Optional callback for presenting user-facing error messages. Set by the GUI or API host layer during startup.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandler.TryCatch``1(System.Func{``0},YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger,System.String,``0,System.Object)
member.summary: Wraps a synchronous function with try-catch, logging and returning a default on failure.
member.param: Optional structured context (e.g. proxy Id) appended to the log entry.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandler.TryCatch(System.Action,YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Wraps a synchronous action with try-catch and logging.
member.param: Optional structured context (e.g. proxy Id) appended to the log entry.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandler.TryCatchAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger,System.String,``0,System.Object)
member.summary: Wraps an async function with try-catch, logging and returning a default on failure.
member.param: Optional structured context (e.g. proxy Id) appended to the log entry.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.ExceptionHandler.TryCatchAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Wraps an async action with try-catch and logging.
member.param: Optional structured context (e.g. proxy Id) appended to the log entry.

member.name: F:YLproxy.Infrastructure.FileLogger._credentialPattern
member.summary: Matches DPAPI-encrypted credential blobs that may leak into log output. Pattern: dpapi:v1: followed by Base64 characters.

member.name: T:YLproxy.Infrastructure.StructuredLogEntry
member.summary: Structured log entry for JSON-line output.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger.Log(YLproxy.Infrastructure.LogLevel,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes a structured log entry with optional contextual data.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger.Log(YLproxy.Infrastructure.LogLevel,System.String,System.Exception,System.Object)
member.summary: Writes a structured log entry with an exception and optional contextual data.

member.name: T:YLproxy.Infrastructure.SimpleRetry
member.summary: Simple retry utility for transient operations (file I/O, DB cleanup, etc.).

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.SimpleRetry.Execute(System.Action,System.Int32,System.Int32,YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger)
member.summary: Executes an action with a fixed-delay retry policy.
member.param: Optional logger for recording retry attempts.
member.exception: Thrown if all attempts fail, containing all exceptions.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.SimpleRetry.Execute``1(System.Func{``0},System.Int32,System.Int32,YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger)
member.summary: Executes a function with a fixed-delay retry policy.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.SimpleRetry.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Int32,System.Int32,YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger)
member.summary: Executes an async action with a fixed-delay retry policy.

member.name: M:YLproxy.Infrastructure.SimpleRetry.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32,System.Int32,YLproxy.Infrastructure.ILogger)
member.summary: Executes an async function with a fixed-delay retry policy.
